title: Unique 1 year rental opportunity:  4 bdrm View house in Dunbar
description:
Beautiful, family-friendly, FULLY FURNISHED 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom home located in the highly sought-after Dunbar/Point Grey/Kitsilano neighborhood on Vancouver’s Westside, just minutes from UBC.
This charming character home offers breathtaking views of the water, downtown skyline, and North Shore mountains. The main floor features an open-concept layout with a bright living room, dining area, and a spacious, fully equipped kitchen. French doors open onto a sunny, south-facing back balcony—perfect for relaxing or entertaining. This level also includes a bedroom with a pull-out sofa bed and a full bathroom.
Upstairs, you’ll find three additional bedrooms, including a primary bedroom with a private balcony and stunning views. The upper level also features a newly renovated bathroom with a modern walk-in shower.
Additional highlights include a fully fenced backyard and convenient access to public transit (bus stop just one block away). Ideally situated close to beaches, UBC, downtown Vancouver, and the airport.  School catchments: Lord Byng High school and Kitchener elementary.

title: Master Suite in Mansion - Live with Like-Minded People!
description:
If you’re a positive person who wants to share a beautiful space with like-minded people... keep reading!
We're a group of career-focused professionals with diverse backgrounds. Our home consists of business owners, software engineers, and a little bit of everything else! We’re a relatively quiet household and do not host parties. Everyone here values cleanliness, positive energy, and mutual respect - we’d love to find someone who can relate!
Available July 1st is the 600 sq ft furnished master bedroom, featuring a private ensuite bathroom with heated floors, a jacuzzi, and a walk-in closet!
The mansion itself is 9,500 sq ft, with 8 bedrooms and 8 bathrooms, sitting on a 1-acre property in Shaughnessy.
It’s a vibrant home with plenty of amenities. The home is large enough that you'll always be able to find empty rooms if you want alone time, or you can head to the kitchen where there's usually someone hanging out. The property also has a full-size gym, sauna, and a cold plunge!
We’re within walking distance to shops, groceries, and cafés, with a Granville Street bus stop right outside the house.
Rent is $2700/month, and it includes everything: utilities, weekly cleaners, and high-speed Wi-Fi.
If this sounds like the right fit, I’d love to hear from you!

The bedrooms are on opposite sides of the living room so there are no shared walls between them! The kitchen has ample space for cooking and prepping as well. The unit self-backs onto the alley so the noise of Main St won't interfere with the daily life of work. This is a must see to truly appreciate how awesome of a location and place it is!
